message:
feat(interpreters): add partial evaluation and staging module skeletons

Implements PartialVal enum, partial_eval_jaxpr() for splitting Jaxprs into
known/unknown sub-Jaxprs with residuals, dce_jaxpr() for dead code elimination,
and staging pipeline (stage_jaxpr, execute_staged, make_jaxpr). 18 tests pass
including 7 PE tests and 2 staging tests. Closes bd-3dl.14.4.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
